title: Delete or Update the Updates using API v2
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
How can i use webhooks to find out when an Monday Item’s Update is deleted or updated? I see the create_update event is the only one that I can subscribe of, but it’s not what i am looking for. Any idea how…

posts.author: glucan (Gabriela Lucan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

How can i use webhooks to find out when an Monday Item’s Update is deleted or updated? I see the create_update event is the only one that I can subscribe of, but it’s not what i am looking for. Any idea how can i be notified about updates deletion & update, without constant polling the Monday API?
